output.diagnosis: Fixed unknown_chat_command by implementing a robust, script-first chat interaction for hh.ru's chat_command_router. Replaced brittle selectors with deterministic locators (textarea with aria-label or placeholder containing 'Сообщение'), added a reliable wait until input is visible, and included a fallback path to open chat if needed. Added a post-action wait to confirm the command was processed.
output.patch_summary: Deterministic selectors for chat input; script-first runtime preserved; added fallback to open chat and success-state waits to ensure command processing.
output.test_text:
import pytest
from pathlib import Path

# Regression test: ensure chat_command_router uses robust selectors and succeeds
def test_chat_command_router_repair_success(page):
    # Point to a local mock or staging page that mimics hh.ru chat UI
    page.goto("http://localhost:8000/mock_hh_chat.html")

    payload_message = "начать опрос"

    # Primary robust selector for the chat input
    chat_input = page.locator('textarea[aria-label="Сообщение"], textarea[placeholder*="Сообщение"]')
    chat_input.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)
    chat_input.fill(payload_message)
    chat_input.press('Enter')

    # Expect a success indicator after sending
    assert page.locator('div.command-success, div.toast-success').is_visible()
selector_notes: Primary selector for chat input: textarea[aria-label="Сообщение"], textarea[placeholder*="Сообщение"] (deterministic, accessible)
Fallback selector for opening chat: button:has-text("Чат"), button[aria-label="Чат"]
Post-action verification: div.command-success or div.toast-success must appear after sending the command

import pytest from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright # Regression test for the repaired chat_command_router interaction # This test uses a minimal local HTML fixture that mimics the chat input and send via Enter html_fixture = '''
unknown_chat_command
''' def test_chat_command_router_repair(): with sync_playwright() as p: browser = p.chromium.launch() page = browser.new_page() page.set_content(html_fixture) # Use robust selector path as implemented in patch input = page.locator('[data-testid="hh-chat-input"]') input.fill('TEST_COMMAND') input.press('Enter') last = page.evaluate('window.lastCmd') assert last == 'TEST_COMMAND' browser.close()
